race.description: New England Shade Sails Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: LEOVANNI (10) talented mare who finds her race fourth-up from the good gate. Forced to go back from the outside gate as fav with a slashing second over 1200m at this track. Will appreciate the extra ground and can get off the mark at start twelve. FINED FOR SPEEDING (1) stretched out to the 1600m with a closing fourth at Narromine a week-and-a-half ago. Best form is over this trip and look for her late. KING OF MANY (3) was in need of the run on debut when he held his ground to the line to finish fifth over 1300m at Scone. Open to improvement in an easier contest. REDALUCA GIRL (11) has made improvement at all four starts this prep but has to contend with a sticky draw today. Can take a hand in the finish if she gets a bit of luck early.
